response.justification: The role's mandatory requirement is 5–10 years of strong hands-on C++ on Windows, plus SQL Server/Oracle and a capital-markets/fixed-income or investment-banking domain background. This candidate is a strong generalist (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but has only ~6 months of professional C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and a university thesis, with no Windows-platform or financial-systems focus. SQL experience is generic (MySQL/MongoDB), not SQL Server or Oracle, and there is no fixed-income or capital-markets exposure. The mismatch on the core mandatory skill is decisive.
strengths: Broad, deep software-engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded
Strong communication: numerous talks, workshops, and teaching/mentoring
Solid engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ vs. the required 5–10 years; no recent C++ work
No SQL Server/Oracle and no Windows-platform development focus
No fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain experience
